title: This one call helped me retire 4 years faster
subtitle: 4 things I did which helped me make money quicker and fast track my way into an early retirement at just 33.
description: How I processed the fact that I'd just negotiated $200K more than what they initially offered me at Meta. Here are 4 things I did which helped me make money quicker and fast track my way into an early retirement.
author: Ninad Mundalik
